name: com.apple.DirectoryService.managed
title: Directory Service
description: The payload that configures an Active Directory (AD) domain.

payload.content: In macOS 10.9 and later, a configuration profile can be used to configure macOS to join an Active Directory (AD) domain. Advanced AD options available via Directory Utility or the dsconfigad command line tool can also be set using a configuration profile.

payloadkeys.title: HostName
payloadkeys.content: The Active Directory domain to join.

payloadkeys.title: UserName
payloadkeys.content: The user name of the account for the domain.

payloadkeys.title: Password
payloadkeys.content: The password of the account for the domain.

payloadkeys.title: Client ID
payloadkeys.content: The client's identifier.

payloadkeys.title: Description
payloadkeys.content: The directory service description.

payloadkeys.title: ADOrganizationalUnit
payloadkeys.content: The organizational unit to add the joining computer object to.

payloadkeys.title: ADMountStyle
payloadkeys.content: The network home protocol to use: `afp` or `smb`.

payloadkeys.title: ADCreateMobileAccountAtLoginFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADCreateMobileAccountAtLogin` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADCreateMobileAccountAtLogin
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system creates a mobile account at login.

payloadkeys.title: ADWarnUserBeforeCreatingMAFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADWarnUserBeforeCreatingMA` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADWarnUserBeforeCreatingMA
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the warning before creating the mobile account.

payloadkeys.title: ADForceHomeLocalFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADForceHomeLocal` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADForceHomeLocal
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system forces a local home directory.

payloadkeys.title: ADUseWindowsUNCPathFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADUseWindowsUNCPath` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADUseWindowsUNCPath
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system uses the UNC path from Active Directory to derive the network home location.

payloadkeys.title: ADAllowMultiDomainAuthFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADAllowMultiDomainAuth` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADAllowMultiDomainAuth
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system allows authentication from any domain in the namespace.

payloadkeys.title: ADDefaultUserShellFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADDefaultUserShell` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADDefaultUserShell
payloadkeys.content: The default user shell.

payloadkeys.title: ADMapUIDAttributeFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADMapUIDAttribute` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADMapUIDAttribute
payloadkeys.content: The map UID to attribute.

payloadkeys.title: ADMapGIDAttributeFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADMapGIDAttribute` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADMapGIDAttribute
payloadkeys.content: The map GID to attribute.

payloadkeys.title: ADMapGGIDAttributeFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADMapGGIDAttributeFlag` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADMapGGIDAttribute
payloadkeys.content: The map group GID to attribute.

payloadkeys.title: ADPreferredDCServerFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADPreferredDCServer` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADPreferredDCServer
payloadkeys.content: The preferred domain server.

payloadkeys.title: ADDomainAdminGroupListFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADDomainAdminGroupList` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADDomainAdminGroupList
payloadkeys.content: The list of Active Directory groups with admin access.

payloadkeys.title: ADNamespaceFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADNamespace` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADNamespace
payloadkeys.content: The primary user account naming convention; either `forest` or `domain`.

payloadkeys.title: ADPacketSignFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADPacketSign` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADPacketSign
payloadkeys.content: The packet signing policy.

payloadkeys.title: ADPacketEncryptFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADPacketEncrypt` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADPacketEncrypt
payloadkeys.content: The packet encryption policy.

payloadkeys.title: ADRestrictDDNSFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADRestrictDDNS` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADRestrictDDNS
payloadkeys.content: An array of strings that represent the interfaces allowed for dynamic DNS updates, such as en0 and en1.

payloadkeys.title: ADTrustChangePassIntervalDaysFlag
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables the `ADTrustChangePassIntervalDays` key.

payloadkeys.title: ADTrustChangePassIntervalDays
payloadkeys.content: The number of days before requiring a change of the computer trust account password. Set to `0` to disable the feature.
